ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-27-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-24-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kulwinder Bains appeared by zoom for Yuan Bermel (Petitioner).

The Court noted that no one is present to object to the petition, and stated that it is leaning towards requiring a full bond, that the Petitioner is out of State and that it has fiduciary duties towards the estate as long as it is open. Ms. Bains stated that this estate involves a trust administration which involves a large amount of money, that the trust administration has concluded and that this is a retirement from a Wife that predeceased the Decedent. Ms. Bains also stated that this is the only asset of the estate, that she is asking for a $20,000.00 bond, that they do not know the true value of the retirement and that they release any information to them. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated November 6, 2011 is admitted to probate. Li Yuan Bermel is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $201,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for September 27, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed by one week prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.
